---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Description
<!-- Clear description of the feature or enhancement -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this solve? What user need does it address? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How should this be implemented? -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- All criteria must be met before closing this issue -->

### Implementation
- [ ] **Actual code implemented** (NOT stubs, NOT placeholders, NOT TODOs)
- [ ] Code follows project coding standards and style guide
- [ ] All functional requirements met
- [ ] Edge cases and error handling implemented
- [ ] No debug code, console.logs, or temporary hacks remain

### Testing
- [ ] **Unit tests written** for all new code (minimum 80% coverage)
- [ ] **Integration tests written** where applicable
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] No existing tests broken by changes
- [ ] Manual testing performed and documented

### Code Review
- [ ] **Pull Request (PR) created** with descriptive title and description
- [ ] PR links to this issue (Closes #XXX)
- [ ] **At least one reviewer approval** obtained
- [ ] All review comments addressed
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline passes (all automated tests)
- [ ] No merge conflicts

### Documentation
- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] User-facing documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] README or relevant docs updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (for releases)

### Deployment
- [ ] **PR merged to main branch**
- [ ] Database migrations created (if needed)
- [ ] Configuration changes documented
- [ ] Deployment notes added (if special steps required)

### Verification
- [ ] **QA sign-off** obtained (for feature work)
- [ ] Acceptance criteria verified by Product Owner (if applicable)
- [ ] Feature works in staging/test environment
- [ ] No regressions introduced

## Technical Details
<!-- Implementation specifics -->

### Affected Files
<!-- List files that will be modified or created -->
- 

### Dependencies
<!-- Related issues, external libraries, or services -->
- Depends on: #
- Related to: #

### API Changes
<!-- If this affects APIs, describe the changes -->

## Priority
<!-- Select one -->
- [ ] P0 - Critical (Drop everything)
- [ ] P1 - High (Current sprint)
- [ ] P2 - Medium (Next sprint)
- [ ] P3 - Low (Backlog)
- [ ] P4 - Future (Long-term)

## Estimated Effort
<!-- Rough estimate -->
- [ ] Small (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Large (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] Extra Large (2+ weeks)

## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, examples, or other relevant information -->

---

## Definition of "Done" Reminder

**This issue is NOT done until:**
1. ✅ Real implementation (not stubs)
2. ✅ Tests written and passing (80%+ coverage)
3. ✅ PR reviewed and merged
4. ✅ Documentation updated
5. ✅ QA verification complete

**See:** [DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md](../../DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md) for complete checklist.
